transcript: I am always running to the grocery store for recipe testing and filming. Thankfully, I have Maybelline Express Brow Satin Duo to ensure that my eyebrows are always looking good. I love that that's only two simple steps, define and fill. I can touch up my eyebrows instantly no matter where I am.
